moments.title: Tour de France continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is ongoing, with riders tackling Stage 16 today, an individual time trial from Évian-Les-Bains to Thonon-Les-Bains.

angles.name: Live Race Update
angles.copy: The yellow jersey battle heats up! Today's Tour de France Stage 16 is a crucial individual time trial. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Mid-Race Drama
angles.copy: Halfway through the Tour de France and the stakes are higher than ever. Catch up on all the mountain drama and sprint finishes so far.

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games kicks off
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games is set to begin in just two days, running from July 23 to August 2, welcoming over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations.

angles.name: Countdown to Glasgow
angles.copy: Just two days until the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games! Get ready for 11 days of incredible sporting action.

angles.name: Scottish Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow is about to take centre stage! The Commonwealth Games start Thursday, bringing the world's best to Scotland. Who are you cheering for?

moments.title: Love Island UK Final Week
moments.blurb: The highly popular thirteenth series of Love Island UK, which premiered on June 1, is heading towards its anticipated final on Monday, July 27.

angles.name: Final Week Drama
angles.copy: It's the FINAL WEEK of Love Island UK! Who do you think will be crowned the winning couple on Monday?

angles.name: Who's Your Bet?
angles.copy: With the Love Island final just days away, who's played the best game? And who deserves that £50k?

moments.title: BBC Proms continues at Royal Albert Hall
moments.blurb: The BBC Proms 2026 season is well underway, running until September 12, with a 'Late Night Baroque Late Night' concert tonight and a 'Horrible Science - Big Bang Prom' on July 25.

angles.name: Proms Tonight
angles.copy: Fancy a cultured evening? The BBC Proms continues tonight at the Royal Albert Hall with a 'Late Night Baroque Late Night'.

angles.name: Family Proms Fun
angles.copy: Looking for something for the kids this weekend? The 'Horrible Science - Big Bang Prom' is at the Royal Albert Hall this Saturday!

moments.title: UK Summer Festivals in full swing
moments.blurb: Major UK festivals like Latitude (Suffolk), Truck (Oxfordshire), and Together Again (Cheshire) are all kicking off this week, offering a diverse range of music from July 23-26.

angles.name: Festival Fever
angles.copy: Wellies ready? Latitude, Truck, and Together Again are all happening this weekend! Where are you heading for your festival fix?

angles.name: Cheshire's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is bringing the party to Bolesworth Castle this weekend, July 24-26, with a huge lineup. Get ready, Cheshire!

moments.title: Depot In The Castle in Cardiff
moments.blurb: The Depot In The Castle festival takes place in Cardiff, Wales, this Saturday, July 25, bringing live music to the iconic castle grounds.

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Gigs
angles.copy: Cardiff, get ready! Depot In The Castle is this Saturday, bringing a fantastic lineup to the city's historic grounds. Who's in?

angles.name: Welsh Music Weekend
angles.copy: Live music at Cardiff Castle this weekend! Depot In The Castle promises a big day out for music lovers in Wales.

moments.title: UK Schools on Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are now officially on their summer break, or beginning this week, marking the start of the main holiday season for families.

angles.name: Summer's Here!
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Wishing all students and families a fantastic summer break across the UK. What are your plans?

angles.name: Road Trip Season
angles.copy: With summer holidays officially starting for many, the UK's roads are set for some busy times! Where's your favourite staycation spot?

moments.title: George Clinton is 85
moments.blurb: Funk legend George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday tomorrow, July 22.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Funkadelic
angles.copy: Getting ready to wish the incomparable George Clinton a very happy 85th birthday tomorrow! The funk doctor is in!

angles.name: Funk Master's Legacy
angles.copy: From Parliament to Funkadelic, George Clinton shaped generations of music. Happy almost birthday to a true pioneer!

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, legendary drummer and vocalist for the Eagles and successful solo artist, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon and solo star Don Henley tomorrow! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Hotel California Hitmaker
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', Don Henley's voice is unmistakable. Happy almost birthday to a rock legend!

moments.title: David Essex is 79
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex celebrates his 79th birthday on July 23.

angles.name: Happy Birthday David Essex
angles.copy: Rocking on! Happy 79th birthday to the legendary David Essex this Thursday. What's your favourite hit from him?

angles.name: British Icon's Day
angles.copy: From 'Gonna Make You A Star' to 'Rock On', David Essex has soundtracked generations. Celebrating his 79th birthday on July 23!

moments.title: Slash turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses and Velvet Revolver guitarist Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on July 23.

angles.name: Guitar Hero's Birthday
angles.copy: Shredding into another year! Happy 61st birthday to the iconic Slash this Thursday. What's your favourite GNR riff?

angles.name: Sweet Child O' Mine Legend
angles.copy: From top hats to epic solos, Slash is a true rock icon. Celebrating his 61st on July 23!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez is 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Bash
angles.copy: Get ready to party! Happy 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday! What's your go-to Jenny from the Block track?

angles.name: Pop Queen's Day
angles.copy: From the dance floor to the big screen, Jennifer Lopez reigns supreme. Celebrating her 57th on July 24!

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Happy 83rd birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger this Sunday. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Stones Legend's Big Day
angles.copy: From Dartford to global superstardom, Mick Jagger is rock 'n' roll personified. Celebrating his 83rd on July 26!

moments.title: Cher Lloyd celebrates 33
moments.blurb: English singer Cher Lloyd, who rose to fame on The X Factor, celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 28.

angles.name: Swagger Jagger Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to Cher Lloyd this Tuesday! Remember her X Factor days and 'Swagger Jagger'?

angles.name: Pop Princess Turns 33
angles.copy: From reality TV to chart success, Cher Lloyd has made her mark. Wishing her a fantastic 33rd birthday on July 28!

moments.title: Soulja Boy turns 36
moments.blurb: American rapper and producer Soulja Boy, known for his hit 'Crank That (Soulja Boy)', celebrates his 36th birthday on July 28.

angles.name: Crank That Birthday
angles.copy: You know it, you love it! Happy 36th birthday to Soulja Boy this Tuesday! Remember when 'Crank That' took over the world?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Pioneer
angles.copy: From viral dance crazes to chart-topping hits, Soulja Boy changed the game. Celebrating his 36th birthday on July 28!

moments.title: Martina McBride is 60
moments.blurb: Award-winning American country music singer Martina McBride celebrates her 60th birthday on July 29.

angles.name: Country Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 60th birthday to the incredible Martina McBride this Wednesday! What's your favourite powerful ballad from her?

angles.name: Celebrating a Country Icon
angles.copy: With a voice that moves mountains, Martina McBride has earned her place as a country legend. Celebrating her 60th on July 29!

moments.title: Kate Bush turns 68
moments.blurb: Iconic British singer, songwriter, and producer Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Legend
angles.copy: Running Up That Hill to wish Kate Bush a very happy 68th birthday this Thursday! What's your favourite enigmatic track?

angles.name: Celebrating a British Visionary
angles.copy: From 'Wuthering Heights' to 'Hounds of Love', Kate Bush's artistry is truly unique. Happy 68th birthday on July 30!

moments.title: Fatboy Slim is 63
moments.blurb: British DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, born Norman Cook, celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 31.

angles.name: Right Here, Right Now Birthday
angles.copy: Big beat legend! Happy 63rd birthday to Fatboy Slim this Friday! What's your favourite track to get the party started?

angles.name: Praise You for the Tunes
angles.copy: From The Housemartins to global DJ icon, Norman Cook is a true music innovator. Celebrating Fatboy Slim's 63rd birthday on July 31!
